summary: Audience recording that smooths the harsh ’82 soundboard edge, capturing a generally smoking 1982 show but leaving some listeners unimpressed by early country‑flavored moments.
review: The three fan comments describe an overall lively 1982 performance – one reviewer calls the shows "smoking" and another praises how the audience tape mellows the typical sharpness of ’82 soundboards. A third listener, however, was disappointed by a sudden country turn with “El Paso,” indicating the set’s mood wasn’t consistent for everyone.

ai_rating.rationale: Only three reviews; one clear 4‑star rating, two with no meaningful star value and mixed comments about the show and recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners note that this audience source smooths the usual harshness of ’82 soundboards, making for a more pleasant listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally energetic and "smoking" early in the set, but an unexpected country‑style number (El Paso) disrupted the vibe for at least one listener.
